options.label: VECTOR
options.title: Split Thunder
options.description: Add one more firing lane, up to a five-lane storm.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 add lanes and widen the main storm pattern for steadier screen coverage.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级逐步增加弹道并扩大主弹幕覆盖，让清场更稳定。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra turns the volley into a full storm fan with maximum lanes and brighter lane separation.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 会把主射击进化为满编风暴扇面，弹道更多且层次更清晰。

options.label: CORE
options.title: Charged Rounds
options.description: Increase bullet damage against elites and Boss armor.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 raise direct bullet damage so elites and Boss armor break faster.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级持续提高子弹直伤，让精英和 Boss 装甲更快被击穿。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra overloads each hit into a high-energy core strike with a larger damage jump.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 会让命中转为高能核心打击，获得一次明显的伤害跃升。

options.label: ENGINE
options.title: Overclock
options.description: Reduce fire interval for denser sustained pressure.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 shorten the fire interval for smoother sustained pressure.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级缩短开火间隔，让持续火力更密、更顺。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra unlocks a high-rhythm firing state that pushes the weapon close to its safe rate cap.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 解锁高节奏连射状态，把武器推近安全射速上限。

options.label: RAIL
options.title: Ion Acceleration
options.description: Increase bullet speed and keep the screen cleaner.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 increase bullet speed so shots reach targets sooner and leave fewer stale bullets.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级提高弹速，让子弹更快抵达目标并减少屏幕残留。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra turns shots into fast ion rails with stronger cleanup and snappier impact timing.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 将子弹进化为高速离子轨道，清屏节奏和命中反馈更利落。

options.label: LANCE
options.title: Piercing Current
options.description: Bullets punch through one more target before fading.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 let bullets pierce more targets before fading, rewarding lined-up enemies.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级提高贯穿次数，敌人排成线时收益更高。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra gives the lance a major pierce jump so dense waves can be carved through in one pass.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 让长枪电流获得大幅贯穿跃升，密集波次可以被一线切开。

options.label: SHELL
options.title: Heavy Thunderhead
options.description: Bullets grow larger and hit harder, but travel slightly slower.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 enlarge shots and raise impact damage while slightly trading away speed.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级让子弹更大、伤害更高，但会牺牲少量弹速。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra forms oversized thunder shells with a stronger hit radius and crushing impact.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 形成超规格雷云重弹，命中半径和压制感都会明显增强。

options.label: FORK
options.title: Forked Wake
options.description: Widen side lanes so split shots carve a broader arc.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 widen side lanes and make split shots cover more of the upper field.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级扩大侧向弹道，让分裂射击覆盖更宽的上半场区域。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra pushes side lanes into a broad lightning wake that better catches drifting enemies.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 把侧向弹道推成宽幅雷尾，更容易卷入游荡中的敌机。

options.label: ARC
options.title: Storm Relay
options.description: Destroyed enemies release a short-range lightning burst.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 strengthen death-chain bursts so clustered enemies trigger cleaner follow-up kills.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级强化击杀连锁，让成群敌人更容易被后续雷爆带走。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra creates a larger relay burst with better range and stronger chain cleanup.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 生成更大范围的风暴传导，连锁清场能力出现质变。

options.label: COIL
options.title: Graviton Coil
options.description: Extend pickup attraction and collect crystals more safely.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 extend pickup magnet range so POWER, repairs, and SP are safer to collect.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级提高拾取吸附范围，让能量、维修和 SP 更安全地回收。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra greatly expands the coil and makes pickups snap in from far wider lanes.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 大幅扩张重力线圈，让远处拾取物也能快速吸入。

options.label: WING
options.title: Escort Vanes
options.description: Add flanking wing shots that sweep wider lanes beside the main volley.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 add and strengthen escort wing shots beside the main volley.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级增加并强化主弹幕两侧的护航翼弹。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra upgrades the escort pattern into bright flanking blades that hold side lanes better.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 将护航弹进化为明亮侧翼刃流，能更稳定守住两侧航道。

options.label: SURGE
options.title: Storm Capacitor
options.description: Periodically fire an overcharged center bolt with extra impact radius.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 improve periodic surge bolts with stronger damage and impact radius.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级强化周期性过载中轴弹，提高伤害和命中半径。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra charges surge bolts into a radiant thunder spear with a larger burst window.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 把过载弹充能为耀光雷枪，爆发窗口和压制范围更强。

options.label: CD
options.title: Flux Capacitor
options.description: Shorten all skill cooldowns and keep emergency tools available more often.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 shorten skill cooldowns so emergency tools come back sooner.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级降低技能冷却，让紧急工具更快可用。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra gives the skill system a major cooldown cut for much higher tactical uptime.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 对技能系统提供一次大幅冷却缩减，显著提高战术续航。

options.label: SP
options.title: Reserve Arsenal
options.description: Increase SP bomb capacity and immediately refill one bomb.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 raise SP bomb capacity and refill one bomb when selected.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级提高 SP 炸弹容量，并在选择时立即补充一枚。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra expands the reserve bay further so late fights have more screen-clear safety.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 进一步扩容备用弹仓，让后期战斗拥有更多清屏保险。

options.label: WARD
options.title: Aegis Weave
options.description: Reduce incoming damage with a layered storm shield.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 reduce incoming damage through layered storm shielding.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级通过多层风暴护盾降低受到的伤害。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra hardens the shield into a stronger defensive weave that makes mistakes less lethal.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 将护盾硬化为更强的防御编织，让失误更不容易瞬间致命。

options.label: PULSE
options.title: Close Thunder
options.description: Auto-release a short-range shock pulse when enemies crowd the hull.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 improve the automatic close-range pulse that protects the hull from crowds.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级强化近身自动脉冲，保护机体免受贴脸围堵。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra turns close defense into a larger reactive shock field with better panic clearing.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 把近身防御进化为更大的反应震荡场，危急时清压能力更强。

options.label: DROP
options.title: Salvage Lattice
options.description: Increase crystal yield and improve repair pickup value.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 improve crystal yield and raise the value of repair pickups.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级提高晶体产出，并增强维修拾取物的回复价值。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra makes salvage returns noticeably richer, accelerating recovery and future upgrades.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 让回收收益明显变厚，加快恢复和后续升级节奏。

options.label: RHYTHM
options.title: Critical Cadence
options.description: Every few volleys become high-impact rhythm shots.

codex.baseEn: Levels 1-6 make rhythm volleys trigger more valuable high-impact shots.
codex.baseZh: 1-6 级让节奏射击更有价值，周期性打出高冲击弹。
codex.ultraEn: Ultra sharpens the cadence into a dramatic crit cycle with brighter, harder rhythm shots.
codex.ultraZh: Ultra 将节奏进化为强烈会心循环，特效更亮、冲击更重。
